missingInputPolicy: Report unavailable toxin-sensitivity model, detoxification capacity, methylation score, homocysteine, labs, exposure history, diet history, supplement context, medication context, broader Detox Pathway gene model, recommendation personalization model, diagnosis, treatment, prevention, and actionability explicitly; do not infer toxin sensitivity or action.
